Scene.title: New Kid
Scene.description: A group chat reveals rumors and hype about Greg

DialogueBlock.Speaker: ALL
DialogueBlock.Line: There's a new kid at the school.
I saw him at the science block with Tonksie and Priya and that.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: MADISON
DialogueBlock.Line: I think it's important we foster a welcoming environment for them.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: ALL
DialogueBlock.Line: I heard that he got expelled from his last school for fighting the PE teacher.
Did you guys know that if it gets over 40 degrees they have to legally send us home? It feels like 40 degrees hey?
I sent a gif via Giphy.
He looks like a loose unit hey.
But seriously. Did Tonksie actually lick the toilet or was he faking?
Don't be immature, Trent. Of course he did.
It's a gif from Rupaul's Drag Race.
I heard he hooked up with a teacher and then the teacher changed their name and now they work at a Kmart or something. Dude's a legend.

DialogueBlock.Speaker: MADISON
DialogueBlock.Line: He's got a mysterious thing going on.
I'm not good at using my words.

Page.DialogueBlock: I heard his dad's in prison for breaking his mum out of prison. I heard he burned a pet store down. I heard he used to be Tumblr famous. I heard he applied for Australia's Got Talent and got through to the filmed bit.
Page.StageDirection: Rumours continue to swirl as the voices get louder and each of the kids log off until the last one remains ...

DialogueBlock.Line: I posted a Baby Yoda meme.
